query:
ALTER TABLE claims 
MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM(
  'submitted',
  'triage',
  'assessment_pending',
  'assessment_in_progress',
  'quotes_pending',
  'comparison',
  'repair_assigned',
  'repair_in_progress',
  'completed',
  'rejected',
  'intake_pending',
  'assessment_complete',
  'closed'
) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'submitted';
